changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE purchase_order ADD COLUMN search_vector tsvector GENERATED ALWAYS AS ( setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(POTITLE, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(PONUMBER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(REQUISTIONNUMBER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCYCODE, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCY_NAME, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCY_ACRONYM, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(STATUS, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(REQUESTER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(SUPPLIER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce( coalesce(COMMODITYCODE, '') || ' ' || regexp_replace(coalesce(COMMODITYCODE, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') || ' ' || regexp_replace( regexp_replace(coalesce(COMMODITYCODE, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), '^([0-9]{3})([0-9]{2})([0-9]{2})$', '\1 \2 \3 \1\2' ), '' )), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(COMMODITYNAME, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce( coalesce(CONTRACTNUMBER, '') || ' ' || CASE WHEN coalesce(CONTRACTNUMBER, '') ~* '^CW[0-9]{4,6}$' THEN substring(CONTRACTNUMBER from '[0-9]+$') ELSE '' END, '' )), 'A') ) STORED;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE purchase_order DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS search_vector;

changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_purchase_order_search_vector_gin ON purchase_order USING GIN (search_vector);

changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS purchase_order_fts_match(tsvector, text);

changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS purchase_order_fts_rank(tsvector, text);
